description: Self-hosted Renovate config. Rationale and setup: https://github.com/gitronald/proj-template/blob/main/docs/guides/github-automation.md

packageRules.description: Group all Python (pyproject.toml) updates into a single PR
Group all GitHub Actions updates into a single PR
Block silent digest-only mutation of already-pinned actions in workflows; version bumps still flow (and update the visible # vX.Y.Z comment)
